sent_simp: 最近电价上涨了不少，电费账单高了很多。
sent_trad: 最近電價上漲了不少，電費賬單高了很多。
pinyin: Zuìjìn diànjià shàngzhǎng le bùshǎo, diànfèi zhàngdān gāo le hěn duō.
english: Electricity prices have risen a lot recently, and the electric bill is much higher.

sent_simp: 这场自行车比赛第三赛段的路况非常复杂。
sent_trad: 這場自行車比賽第三賽段的路況非常複雜。

english: The road conditions in the third stage of this cycling race are very complex.

sent_simp: 公司决定重整内部结构，提高工作效率。
sent_trad: 公司決定重整內部結構，提高工作效率。

english: The company decided to restructure its internal organization to improve efficiency.

sent_simp: 总统乘坐专机前往参加峰会。
sent_trad: 總統乘坐專機前往參加峰會。
pinyin: Zǒngtǒng chéngzuò zhuānjī qiánwǎng cānjiā fēnghuì.
english: The president flew on a dedicated aircraft to attend the summit.

sent_simp: 他在推特上认识了很多推友，经常互动。
sent_trad: 他在推特上認識了很多推友，經常互動。
pinyin: Tā zài Tuītè shàng rènshi le hěn duō tuīyǒu, jīngcháng hùdòng.
english: He has made many Twitter friends online and they interact frequently.

sent_simp: 她写了一篇博文，分享了自己的旅行经历。
sent_trad: 她寫了一篇博文，分享了自己的旅行經歷。
pinyin: Tā xiě le yī piān bówén, fēnxiǎng le zìjǐ de lǚxíng jīnglì.
english: She wrote a blog post sharing her travel experiences.

sent_simp: 晚清的变法运动试图推动政治改革。
sent_trad: 晚清的變法運動試圖推動政治改革。
pinyin: Wǎn Qīng de biànfǎ yùndòng shìtú tuīdòng zhèngzhì gǎigé.
english: The late Qing reform movement attempted to push forward political change.

sent_simp: 她从小学声乐，现在是一名专业歌手。
sent_trad: 她從小學聲樂，現在是一名專業歌手。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo xué shēngyuè, xiànzài shì yī míng zhuānyè gēshǒu.
english: She studied vocal music from a young age and is now a professional singer.

sent_simp: 他是被领养的，但他的亲妈从未放弃寻找他。
sent_trad: 他是被領養的，但他的親媽從未放棄尋找他。
pinyin: Tā shì bèi lǐngyǎng de, dàn tā de qīnmā cóng wèi fàngqì xúnzhǎo tā.
english: He was adopted, but his biological mother never gave up searching for him.

sent_simp: 他善于操弄舆论，让人们相信自己的观点。
sent_trad: 他善於操弄輿論，讓人們相信自己的觀點。

english: He is skilled at manipulating public opinion to make people believe his views.

sent_simp: 村里决定兴办一所小学，方便孩子们上学。
sent_trad: 村裡決定興辦一所小學，方便孩子們上學。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ juédìng xīngbàn yī suǒ xiǎoxué, fāngbiàn háizimen shàngxué.
english: The village decided to set up a primary school to make it easier for children to attend.

sent_simp: 银行需要计提足够的坏账准备金。
sent_trad: 銀行需要計提足夠的壞賬準備金。
pinyin: Yínháng xūyào jìtí zúgòu de huàizhàng zhǔnbèijīn.
english: Banks need to set aside sufficient provisions for bad debts.

sent_simp: 汉语和闽南语同属汉藏语族。
sent_trad: 漢語和閩南語同屬漢藏語族。

english: Mandarin and Hokkien both belong to the Sino-Tibetan language branch.

sent_simp: 上级派人来督办这个项目，确保按时完成。
sent_trad: 上級派人來督辦這個項目，確保按時完成。

english: The higher-ups sent someone to oversee the project and ensure it would be completed on time.

sent_simp: 他喜欢做短线投资，快进快出赚差价。
sent_trad: 他喜歡做短線投資，快進快出賺差價。

english: He likes short-term investing, buying and selling quickly to profit from price differences.

sent_simp: 今年公司有盈余，员工都得到了年终奖。
sent_trad: 今年公司有盈餘，員工都得到了年終獎。
pinyin: Jīnnián gōngsī yǒu yíngyú, yuángōng dōu dédào le niánzhōng jiǎng.
english: The company had a surplus this year, so all employees received a year-end bonus.

sent_simp: 寺庙里住着几位尼姑，每天诵经礼佛。
sent_trad: 寺廟裡住著幾位尼姑，每天誦經禮佛。

english: Several Buddhist nuns live in the temple, chanting sutras and paying respects every day.

sent_simp: 有些地方的人喜欢冬天吃狗肉来暖身子。
sent_trad: 有些地方的人喜歡冬天吃狗肉來暖身子。
pinyin: Yǒuxiē dìfang de rén xǐhuān dōngtiān chī gǒuròu lái nuǎn shēnzi.
english: People in some regions like to eat dog meat in winter to warm themselves up.

sent_simp: 他用拼音输入法打中文，速度越来越快了。
sent_trad: 他用拼音輸入法打中文，速度越來越快了。
pinyin: Tā yòng pīnyīn shūrùfǎ dǎ Zhōngwén, sùdù yuèláiyuè kuài le.
english: He types Chinese using a pinyin input method, and his speed keeps getting faster.

sent_simp: 这篇论文通过大量考据证明了那段历史的真相。
sent_trad: 這篇論文通過大量考據證明了那段歷史的真相。
pinyin: Zhè piān lùnwén tōngguò dàliàng kǎojù zhèngmíng le nà duàn lìshǐ de zhēnxiàng.
english: This paper used extensive textual research to establish the truth of that period of history.

sent_simp: 年轻人应该趁早努力，争取在事业上有所作为。
sent_trad: 年輕人應該趁早努力，爭取在事業上有所作為。
pinyin: Niánqīng rén yīnggāi chènzǎo nǔlì, zhēngqǔ zài shìyè shàng yǒu suǒ zuò wéi.
english: Young people should work hard early on and strive to achieve something meaningful in their careers.

sent_simp: 他说话总是一套官话，让人听不出真实想法。
sent_trad: 他說話總是一套官話，讓人聽不出真實想法。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà zǒng shì yī tào guānhuà, ràng rén tīng bu chū zhēnshí xiǎngfǎ.
english: He always speaks in bureaucratic language, making it hard to know what he really thinks.

sent_simp: 这家餐厅是两家公司合营的，生意很好。
sent_trad: 這家餐廳是兩家公司合營的，生意很好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng shì liǎng jiā gōngsī héyíng de, shēngyi hěn hǎo.
english: This restaurant is a joint venture between two companies and is doing very well.

sent_simp: 我们一家去海边度假村住了三天，玩得很开心。
sent_trad: 我們一家去海邊度假村住了三天，玩得很開心。

english: Our family stayed at a seaside resort for three days and had a great time.

sent_simp: 两国达成协议后，驻扎在边境的部队开始撤军。
sent_trad: 兩國達成協議後，駐紮在邊境的部隊開始撤軍。

english: After the two countries reached an agreement, troops stationed at the border began to withdraw.

sent_simp: 我去银行支行办理了开户手续，很顺利。

english: I went to a bank branch to open an account, and it went smoothly.

sent_simp: 他因为长期熬夜，患上了严重的胃病。

pinyin: Tā yīnwèi chángqī áoyè, huànshàng le yánzhòng de wèibìng.
english: Because he stayed up late for a long time, he came down with a serious stomach illness.

sent_simp: 他打麻将很顺，连续两局都自摸赢了。

english: He was on a roll in mahjong, winning two games in a row by self-drawing the winning tile.

sent_simp: 检方提出了充分的证据，法官采信了他们的说法。

sent_simp: 公司的年报显示，去年营业额增长了百分之二十。
sent_trad: 公司的年報顯示，去年營業額增長了百分之二十。

english: The company's annual report shows that revenue grew by twenty percent last year.

sent_simp: 这条公路禁止重载卡车通行，以保护路面。
sent_trad: 這條公路禁止重載卡車通行，以保護路面。

english: This road prohibits heavy-load trucks to protect the road surface.

sent_simp: 房价由供需关系决定，需求大时价格就会上涨。

sent_simp: 市场上生猪的价格最近波动很大。
sent_trad: 市場上生豬的價格最近波動很大。
pinyin: Shìchǎng shàng shēngzhū de jiàgé zuìjìn bōdòng hěn dà.
english: The price of live pigs on the market has been fluctuating a lot recently.

sent_simp: 她是当红的小花，出道两年就拿了最佳新人奖。

english: She is a hot young actress who won the Best Newcomer award just two years after her debut.

sent_simp: 这个楼盘的位置不错，离地铁站只有五分钟。

sent_simp: 她最近迷上了一部悬疑网剧，每天追更。

english: She has recently become hooked on a suspense web series and follows it every day.

sent_simp: 他在一家大公司的人力资源部门工作了五年。

english: He has worked in the human resources department of a large company for five years.

sent_simp: 这篇文章有不少创见，读起来很有启发。

pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng yǒu bùshǎo chuàngjiàn, dú qǐlái hěn yǒu qǐfā.
english: This article contains quite a few original ideas and is very thought-provoking to read.

sent_simp: 他小时候用气枪打过靶，成绩还不错。

sent_simp: 他失业后申请了低保，靠政府补贴维持生活。
sent_trad: 他失業後申請了低保，靠政府補貼維持生活。
